title: Longest String Chain
notes: Time complexity increases by factors of ~10.9x, ~10.5x, and ~11.7x for each 10x increase in N. This slightly supra-linear growth matches O(N log N), primarily driven by the initial sorting of words by length. Space complexity increases roughly linearly (~7.7x, ~7.9x, ~18.5x) corresponding to O(N) memory required for the DP hash map storing maximum chain lengths for each word.
